name: Neto by Maropost Release Notes – 17 Nov 2025
body: [{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"OVERVIEW"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"In this release, we are excited to announce an update to our purchase-related rewards system."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"EARN REWARDS FEATURE"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Shoppers can now earn lucrative reward points on their recent in-store and online purchases. Merchants can enable this feature on their Neto POS account and incentivize shoppers to spend more on products to earn greater reward deals."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"This, in turn, enables merchants to drive sales promotions across multiple channels and attract more traffic to their physical and online stores."}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/6JZF7E6RMPVF/reward19-281-29.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/6JZF7E6RMPVF/reward19-281-29.png","name":"reward19(1).png","type":"image/png","size":224367,"width":2880,"height":1556,"displaySize":"large","float":"none","downloadUrl":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/api/v2/media/download-by-url?url=https%3A%2F%2Fus.v-cdn.net%2F6038474%2Fuploads%2F6JZF7E6RMPVF%2Freward19-281-29.png","active":true,"mediaID":1435,"dateInserted":"2025-11-17T14:48:29+00:00","insertUserID":2012,"foreignType":"embed","foreignID":"2012","embedType":"image"}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"To learn more about earning and redeeming reward points during Neto POS order checkout, read our "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/2340-neto-pos-earn-redeem-rewards-program","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"Neto POS Earn & Redeem Rewards Program","bold":true}]},{"text":" article."}]}]
